calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Mary Ellen Scherer, CSR# 5208. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-16-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Pappina Thompson.
Plaintiff: Jeff Breibart, present in pro per.
Paul Alaga, Esq. for the Defendant: James Brett, also present.
Case settled and read into the record as follows:
Parties settled for the sum of $3,000.00 by installments.
First payment of $300.00 is due on Dec. 1st, 2007, payment of $300.00 there after is due on the first of each month until fully paid.
5 Days Notice by FAX to counsel for none payment and for entry of Judgment for balance and interest.
Parties agreed to terms, matter is placed on CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar on Dec. 16, 2008 at 10:00 A.M. in Dept. 212.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Set For Trial On Nov-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Jul-11-2007 Off Calendar

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
